subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #028 The Pre-existence of Christ
subcodes.first_line: Pre-existence is of two kinds. One is essential pre-existence, which is not preceded by a cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: قدم بر دو قسم است قدم ذاتیست که مسبوق بعلت نباشد بلکه وجودش بذاته
subcodes.subjects: @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @Christ; Christianity, @Word of God sanctified from time and place
